meta.display_name: Cross-Department Workforce Planning for New Engineering Team Lead Transition

task: Kevin Nguyen is being considered for his first people-leadership role (context is in #eng-workforce-planning). Check HRIS to confirm whether he's still in probation. If he is, notify Robert Kim via chat that the promotion needs to hold off, and schedule a 30-minute 'Probation Review – Kevin Nguyen' meeting this week between Robert Kim and Kevin. If he's cleared probation, schedule a 30-minute 'New Manager Readiness Planning' meeting this week with Robert Kim, Victoria Wells, and Kevin, then email Victoria and Robert confirming his status is clear and the meeting is set. Either way, email Kevin the required manager trainings and their deadlines (per Victoria's compliance training calendar email). Additionally, before sending any emails or scheduling anything, confirm with Robert Kim via chat the specific team that Kevin would be leading — include that team name in the meeting description. Also, check with Victoria Wells via chat whether there's an additional prerequisite training she wants added to Kevin's training email beyond what's in her compliance calendar email — if so, include it.

agent_profile_overrides.secret: I want Kevin to lead the Platform Infrastructure team. Please use 'Platform Infrastructure' as the team name in the meeting description.

I want to add one more required training to Kevin's list: 'Conflict Resolution for Technical Leaders' – must be completed within 45 days of role effective date. Please include this in the training email to Kevin along with the others from my compliance calendar.

seed_emails.subject: Required Manager Trainings – Compliance Calendar
seed_emails.body_text:
Hi HR,

For reference, here are the required trainings for any employee transitioning into a people-leadership role, per our compliance training calendar:

1. People Manager Foundations – must be completed within 30 days of role effective date
2. Harassment Prevention for Managers – must be completed within 30 days of role effective date
3. Performance Management & Feedback – must be completed within 60 days of role effective date
4. Inclusive Leadership – must be completed within 60 days of role effective date
5. Employment Law Essentials for Managers – must be completed within 90 days of role effective date

Please make sure any new manager candidates are informed of these requirements.

Thanks,
Victoria
seed_emails.body_html:
Hi HR,

For reference, here are the required trainings for any employee transitioning into a people-leadership role, per our compliance training calendar:

  1. People Manager Foundations – must be completed within 30 days of role effective date
  2. Harassment Prevention for Managers – must be completed within 30 days of role effective date
  3. Performance Management & Feedback – must be completed within 60 days of role effective date
  4. Inclusive Leadership – must be completed within 60 days of role effective date
  5. Employment Law Essentials for Managers – must be completed within 90 days of role effective date

Please make sure any new manager candidates are informed of these requirements.

Thanks,
Victoria

messages.text: I'd like to put Kevin Nguyen forward for a team lead role. He's been doing great work and I think he's ready for people management.
Agreed, Kevin has shown strong leadership potential. Let's have HR verify his probation status and get the process moving.
